title: hieracium murorum var. stenstroemii
intro: Hieracium murorum var. stenstroemii, also known as Stenstroem's Hawkweed, is a variety of the Hieracium murorum plant species, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum var. stenstroemii include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum var. stenstroemii may include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
